briefdescription.para: I2C IDT 8N49N241 Address.
I2C IO Expander 1 address.
I2C IO Expander 0 address.
I2C TI LMK03318 Address.
I2C SI5344 Address.
PS I2C RC21008A Address.
I2C Address NB7NQ621M.
I2C Address NB7NQ621M.
I2C Address NB7NQ621M.
I2C Address NB7NQ621M.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 SlaveAddr, u8 Value, u8 Mask)
memberdef.name: Vfmc_ModifyRegister

briefdescription.para: This function modifies a single byte to the TI LMK03318.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u16 SlaveAddr, u8 *MsgPtr, unsigned ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: Vfmc_I2cSend

briefdescription.para: This function send the IIC data to Vfmc.

parameterdescription.para: IIC instance pointer.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the device to send the specified data to.
points to the data to be sent.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
indicates whether to hold or free the bus after transmitting the data.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u16 SlaveAddr, u8 *BufPtr, unsigned ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: Vfmc_I2cRecv

briefdescription.para: This function send the IIC data to Vfmc.

parameterdescription.para: IIC instance pointer.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the device to send the specified data to.
points to the memory to write the data.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
indicates whether to hold or free the bus after transmitting the data.

briefdescription.para: This function setup the IIC MUX to select the VFMC on the HPC header.
This function initializes the Video FMC clock generator and clock MUXs for HDMI operation.
This function en/disables the power up pin of TI LMK03318 clock generator.

parameterdescription.para: true =power down / false= power up.

briefdescription.para: This function Turns on or off the VFMC LED.

parameterdescription.para: - LED position based on XVfmc_Gpio_Led typedef.
- TRUE=On ; FALSE=Off.

simplesect.para: LED0 - Init Done LED1 - Ch4 as Data

briefdescription.para: This function Sets the clock or data selection for channel 4 of the TX or RX mezzanine cards.

parameterdescription.para: - Ch4 Selection based on XVfmc_Gpio_Ch4_DataClkSel typedef. TX > VFMC_GPIO_TX_CH4_As_DataAndClock > VFMC_GPIO_TX_CH4_As_ClockOut RX > VFMC_GPIO_RX_CH4_As_Data > VFMC_GPIO_RX_CH4_As_Clock

simplesect.para:
- LED1 - ON Ch4 as Data ; OFF- Clock
Ignore configuration of TxMezz is Active type

briefdescription.para: This function Enables or Disables the ONSEMI NB7NQ621M on the TX MEZZ slot.

parameterdescription.para: - TRUE / FALSE

briefdescription.para: This function Enables or Disables the ONSEMI NB7NQ621M on the RX MEZZ slot.

parameterdescription.para: - TRUE / FALSE

memberdef.argsstring: (XVfmc *VfmcPtr, u8 IsFRL, u64 LineRate, u8 Lanes)
memberdef.name: Vfmc_Gpio_Mezz_HdmiTxDriver_Reconfig

briefdescription.para: This function Enables or Disables the ONSEMI NB7NQ621M on the TX MEZZ slot.

parameterdescription.para: - TRUE / FALSE

memberdef.argsstring: (XVfmc *VfmcPtr, u8 IsFRL, u64 LineRate, u8 Lanes)
memberdef.name: Vfmc_Gpio_Mezz_HdmiRxDriver_Reconfig

briefdescription.para: This function Enables or Disables the ONSEMI NB7NQ621M on the RX MEZZ slot.

parameterdescription.para: - TRUE / FALSE

briefdescription.para: This function en/disables the power up pin of TI LMK03318 clock generator.

parameterdescription.para: true =power down / false= power up.

briefdescription.para: This function selects the TX ref clock on GTYE4 devices.

parameterdescription.para: of ref clock

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the ref clock source is successfully set. XST_FAILURE otherwise.
